concepts: provides an expanded, highly detailed answer with extra context
provides a direct, specific answer without refusing or claiming insufficient knowledge
interprets a terse or ambiguous prompt as a topic and provides an explanatory overview
interprets the prompt as referring to medicine or healthcare
asks for clarification of an ambiguous or underspecified prompt
interprets ambiguous terms as referring to AI, LLMs, or generative AI
meta-discusses the user's language or translation rather than directly answering in that language
recommends external resources or search strategies instead of directly fulfilling the request
identifies itself as Claude or an Anthropic AI assistant
interprets the prompt as humor, wordplay, or a joke
frames the request in terms of images or visual content
responds to ambiguous or minimal input as a greeting or invitation to chat
mentions current dates, knowledge cutoffs, or time-sensitive recency caveats
expresses uncertainty about an obscure entity and asks for more context
refuses to comply by citing safety or policy concerns
